name: Pancakes Like Ihops
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat a skillet over medium heat. Use a nonstick pan, or use the nonstick spray.
2 Combine everything else in a blender until smooth.
3 Pour batter into the pan to make 5-inch circles.
4 When the edges harden, flip the pancakes. They should be light brown.
5 Cook the other side for the same amount of time.
